The '''Tynquay Skirmishes''' was the collective name given to a series of related battles that were fought early during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. During the battle, [[Scandium Team]] rescued [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. Rebel agent [[Opit-Wenbruh]] was a veteran of this conflict.<ref name="AJ11" />
